# Anthropic AI Skills

## About
AnthropicAISkills.com is a resource hub for learning and applying Anthropic's AI technologies, including Claude and Constitutional AI. We cover practical guides, comparisons, and skill-building content for developers and business users.

## Topics
- Anthropic and Claude AI
- Constitutional AI
- AI safety
- Claude API usage
- Business AI applications
- AI skill development
- Claude vs other AI models

## URLs
- https://anthropicaiskills.com/ : Homepage
- https://anthropicaiskills.com/blog : Blog
- https://anthropicaiskills.com/blog/what-is-anthropic-and-why-does-it-matter-for-ai-safety : What is Anthropic and why does it matter for AI safety
- https://anthropicaiskills.com/blog/anthropic-claude-vs-gpt-4-an-honest-comparison : Anthropic Claude vs GPT-4 — An Honest Comparison
- https://anthropicaiskills.com/blog/how-anthropics-constitutional-ai-works-plain-english : How Anthropic's Constitutional AI Works (Plain English)
- https://anthropicaiskills.com/blog/top-anthropic-ai-skills-to-learn-in-2026 : Top Anthropic AI Skills to Learn in 2026
- https://anthropicaiskills.com/blog/how-to-use-the-anthropic-api-getting-started-guide : How to Use the Anthropic API — Getting Started Guide
- https://anthropicaiskills.com/blog/why-anthropic-ai-is-the-best-choice-for-business-applications : Why Anthropic AI is the Best Choice for Business Applications
